name: Carpenter's Nail
descs:
[Effects apply only to #4 Deployed Identity]

If this unit has 2+ Pierce Attack Skills, gain 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] at Turn Start.

[Effects apply only to the #4 Deployed Identity]

If this unit has 2+ Pierce Attack Skills, gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> [PenetrateDamageUp] at Turn Start.

[Effects apply only to #4, <style="upgradeHighlight">#5</style> Deployed Identities]

If this unit has 2+ Pierce Attack Skills, gain 2 [PenetrateDamageUp] at Turn Start.
